code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = tokens.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      match string.parse_int(t)
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        ()
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn intersect(_ a: List<Int>, _ b: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = a.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    match a.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      if list.contains(b, x) and not list.contains(result, x)
        result = list.push(result, x)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_asc(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  for x in xs
    mut new_list: List<Int> = []
    mut inserted = false
    for y in sorted
      if not inserted and x < y
        new_list = list.push(new_list, x)
        inserted = true
      end
      new_list = list.push(new_list, y)
    end
    if not inserted
      new_list = list.push(new_list, x)
    end
    sorted = new_list
  end
  sorted
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let a = parse_line(line1)
let b = parse_line(line2)
let inter = intersect(a, b)
let sorted = sort_asc(inter)

if sorted.len() == 0
  println("empty")
else
  mut out = ""
  mut j = 0
  let m = sorted.len()
  while j < m
    match sorted.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      if j == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
